title: LDShadowLady's Disney Wish Rebrushed
description: This mod is a lucky block style mod that adds Disney-related items to Minecraft.
body:
✨ Discover whimsical Disney-themed hats by breaking Disney Wish Blocks! This faithful remake of LDShadowLady's mod lets you collect and wear iconic Disney headwear in Minecraft 1.20.1+.

<details>
<summary>🎩 Featured Hats</summary>

Collect them all to show off your Disney style!

🦌 Bambi • 🤖 Baymax • 🎸 Coco
🌼 Daisy Duck • 🦆 Donald Duck • 🎩 Fantasia
🐶 Goofy • 🍀 Lucky • 🐭 Mickey Ears
🎀 Minnie Ears • 🎪 Oddball • 🐾 Patch
📰 Penny • 🐕 Pluto • 🍯 Winnie the Pooh
👽 Stitch • 🌸 Tigerlily Tiara • 🐉 Yoda Ears

</details>



Wishes don't always come true...

Looking for more hats? Check out my [Critter Caps](https://modrinth.com/mod/critter-caps-disney-wish-addon) addon.

This is an unofficial fan continuation. Not affiliated with Disney/LDShadowLady. ✨
